name: Classic blue cheese vinaigrette
intro: This rich dressing is a little thicker than most vinaigrettes, and should be used sparingly. It is traditionally drizzled over crisp leaf salads, such as the Endive salad with spinach and pears.

ingredients.item: white wine or apple cider vinegar
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Combine the vinegar and lemon juice in a bowl. Add the mayonnaise and oil to a separate bowl, then pour in the vinegar-lemon mixture, whisking constantly, until the dressing has emulsified.
Add the cheese to the bowl, and whisk again until smooth. Season to taste with salt and black pepper. Serve immediately.
